content: Audit current state of backend SegFormer pipeline (clothing_parser.py + garment_vision.py): bbox padding budgets, category enforcement, alpha intersection threshold
Build a diagnostic script that runs clothing_parser+garment_vision against test images, dumping: SegFormer masks, per-region bboxes, pre/post rembg crops, alpha coverage %, final crop sizes
Run diagnostic against 6 outfit images from test_images/. Aggregate stats per image: regions detected, regions kept, regions dropped (and why), under-coverage failures
Compare against the expected 20-30 items baseline; identify the specific patches that regressed (M21 / 12k / 12l) by toggling each off in the diagnostic
Produce diagnosis report in plan.md with concrete root cause(s), recommended fixes, and which patches to revert/adjust. No code fix this session (per user choice 5a).
